intro: Compare climate risk between ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek, Australian Capital Territory and ACT Remainder - Tuggeranong, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: ACT Remainder - Tuggeranong has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.
